validation.html_validator: Single non-critical warning: 'Named entity expected' — likely false positive from emoji/Unicode content in HTML5. No structural errors.
sections_present: Header with nav and theme toggle
Hero with headline, subheadline, 2 CTA buttons, avatar img
Projects with 3 article cards (images, titles, descriptions, tags)
Experience with 3 timeline items (period, role, company, achievement blockquote)
Footer with social emoji links and copyright
validation.css_js_links: PASS — styles.css linked in head, app.js linked before closing body
validation.accessibility_basics: PASS — aria-labels on icon buttons, aria-expanded on mobile toggle, labels with for/id on all inputs, aria-hidden on decorative dots, role=alert on toast, aria-live=polite on error spans

validation.theme_system: PASS — :root defines dark theme variables (#0f172a background), body.light-theme overrides for light mode, 0.3s transitions on body and all children
validation.section_animations: PASS — .section-hidden { opacity:0; transform:translateY(40px) }, .section-visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); transition:0.6s ease-out }
validation.hero_animation: PASS — .section-hero-load triggers fadeSlideIn keyframes on hero-content and hero-visual
validation.gradient_background: PASS — @keyframes gradientShift on .hero-bg (12s ease-in-out infinite, 400% background-size)
validation.progress_bars: PASS — .skill-bar initial width:0, gradient fill, JS handles fill animation
validation.timeline: PASS — .timeline::before vertical border line, .timeline-dot with .animate-dot class for scale+glow
validation.form_states: PASS — .form-input.error triggers @keyframes shake, .form-input:focus with blue glow
validation.toast: PASS — .toast fixed bottom-right, green background, toastIn/toastOut animations over 3s
validation.responsive_breakpoints: PASS — 640px (2-col projects, larger avatar), 768px (row hero, tablet nav), 1024px (3-col projects, 90vh hero), 1280px (max container)

validation.hero_on_load: PASS — DOMContentLoaded ensures hero .section-hero-load triggers CSS animation
validation.intersection_observer: PASS — Observes all .section-hidden elements with threshold: 0.15, adds .section-visible on intersect, unobserve after
validation.skill_bar_animation: PASS — animateProgressBars() uses requestAnimationFrame with cubic ease-out (1 - (1-t)³) over 1500ms, fills from 0 to data-percentage target
validation.project_card_stagger: PASS — Each .project-card gets inline opacity/transform reset, then setTimeout(150ms * index) applies visible styles
validation.theme_toggle: PASS — localStorage key 'aymen-portfolio-theme', toggle adds/removes .light-theme on body, persists preference
validation.form_validation: PASS — Prevents default submit, checks name (non-empty), email (regex), message (non-empty), adds .error class (triggers CSS shake), removes after 600ms
validation.toast_notification: PASS — Creates .toast div with '✅ Message sent!', appends to body, auto-removes after 3000ms, uses role=alert
validation.localStorage_persistence: PASS — Saves form data on submit and on input (draft), loads saved data on page load
validation.timeline_dot_animation: PASS — Reads data-delay attribute, setTimeout adds .animate-dot class to each .timeline-dot
validation.mobile_nav: PASS — .mobile-menu-toggle toggles .active on .nav-links, updates aria-expanded, closes on link click
validation.no_console_errors: PASS — No syntax errors, all DOM queries null-guarded

requirement_coverage.hero: PASS — Matches exact headline, subheadline, CTA texts, gradient text, animated background, avatar image
requirement_coverage.skills: PASS — 5 skills with exact percentages, progress bars animate from 0 on scroll, percentage numbers displayed
requirement_coverage.projects: PASS — 3 cards with exact titles, descriptions, tech tags, generate_image thumbnails, hover lift+shadow
requirement_coverage.experience: PASS — 3 timeline entries with exact periods, roles, companies, achievements, vertical line+dots animate on scroll
requirement_coverage.contact: PASS — Name/Email/Message fields, real-time validation, shake on error, green toast on success, localStorage persistence
requirement_coverage.footer: PASS — GitHub(💻)/LinkedIn(🔗)/Twitter(🐦) emoji links, copyright '© 2025 Aymen'
requirement_coverage.theme: PASS — Dark default (#0f172a), light toggle with localStorage, 0.3s transitions
requirement_coverage.animations: PASS — All sections start hidden (opacity:0, translateY:40px), animate on scroll (IntersectionObserver 15%), hero on load, cards stagger 150ms
requirement_coverage.accessibility: PASS — Semantic HTML, ARIA labels, keyboard navigable, form labels, focus-visible outlines, prefers-reduced-motion

test_report.notes: The HTML validator produced a single non-critical warning 'Named entity expected. Got none.' which is likely triggered by the validator's handling of emoji characters or the en-dash Unicode characters in the timeline. The HTML5 specification permits these characters. All other validations pass cleanly.
